title: AgencyCostSharingCode
description: A code that indicates whether recipient contributions are mandatory cost sharing (matching) or voluntary cost sharing, which are pledged contributions considered by the awarding agency during application evaluation.

oneOf.title: Voluntary rating
oneOf.description: Matching requirements are voluntary and part of the rating criteria

oneOf.title: Determined at NOFO level
oneOf.description: The cost sharing/matching requirements are determined as part of the Notice of Funding Opportunity (NOFO)

oneOf.title: Mandatory with exceptions or waivers
oneOf.description: Matching requirements are mandatory but there is an allowance for waivers or certain exceptions

x-grantsActivityReferences: GRM.010.010 Grant Program Set-up and Maintenance
x-relatedElements: (3) Formula Matching Requirements Maintenance of Effort - Indicators
